title: trifolium arvense var. preslianum
intro: Trifolium arvense var. preslianum, also known as the annual clover, is a variety of the trifolium arvense plant, which is a species of clover that is commonly found in Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, and has been shown to have potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of trifolium arvense var. preslianum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
